notes: NI Scarbee Mark I — deeply sampled Fender Rhodes Mark I electric piano in Kontakt. Each velocity layer and tine resonance was individually sampled. CC 11 (Expression) controls dynamics/output. CC 66 (Sostenuto) holds selected notes while new notes play dry — useful for held Rhodes chords. The tremolo is built-in and rate/depth are QC-controllable. For the classic Rhodes through amp tone, combine moderate overdrive (QC5) with slightly lowered pickup position (QC2) and slow tremolo. Mechanical noises (key click, tine buzz) add realism — keep low in a mix, higher for solo/close-up contexts.

Expression.description: Expression — primary dynamics. Automate for natural swell into choruses.

Sustain.description: Sustain pedal — sustain dampers open (essential for Rhodes playing)

Sostenuto.description: Sostenuto — holds selected bass notes while right-hand notes play with dampers engaged

Soft Pedal.description: Soft pedal — reduces velocity sensitivity / softens tone

Quick Control 1.description: Tine Character / Bark — tine hardness and bite; high = more aggressive bell attack and bark, low = smooth and warm

Quick Control 2.description: Pickup Position — close (bright, nasal, classic) vs far (darker, more round and vintage)

Quick Control 3.description: Tremolo Rate — speed of the built-in stereo tremolo (0 = slowest, 127 = fastest panning)

Quick Control 4.description: Tremolo Depth — how wide the stereo tremolo swings (0 = off, 127 = hard panning)

Quick Control 5.description: Overdrive Amount — built-in overdrive; low = clean studio Rhodes, medium = warm breakup, high = Stevie Wonder grind

Quick Control 6.description: Release Noise — tine damper noise on key release; adds organic, played-in character

Quick Control 7.description: Key / Mechanical Noise — key bed and action mechanical noise level; subtle = realism, high = character

Quick Control 8.description: Humanise — random velocity and tuning variation between notes for a less pristine, more human feel

Brightness.description: Tone brightness — high-shelf EQ across the output

Chorus.description: Chorus send — adds vintage chorus/phase shimmer
